headline: Amazon’s search bar will invent AI-generated products you can’t buy
summary: Amazon's updated search bar will now show AI-generated product images. The feature currently surfaces AI images for clothing and home goods. You can tap images to search for similar-looking, purchasable items.

headline: PlayStation is getting back to what it’s good at
summary: PlayStation is refocusing on premium, narrative-driven, single-player games. This strategy shift was evident at its latest State of Play showcase. It follows a series of costly live-service game missteps.

headline: Supernatural isn’t dead after all
summary: Meta's popular VR fitness game, Supernatural, has been given a second chance. Previously, Meta announced no new content, enraging its community. The game will now continue to receive updates and content.

headline: Dreame’s L20 Ultra robovac is an unbeatable deal for $280
summary: The Dreame L20 Ultra robovac/mop hybrid is available for its lowest-ever price of $280. This premium device offers strong cleaning performance and minimal maintenance. It's a fantastic deal for a feature-rich robot vacuum.

headline: Undying Love: The Beloved Vampire Revenge Series Finally Gets a Conclusion
summary: The highly anticipated vampire revenge series, 'Undying Love,' has finally concluded. Fans can now experience the full and final story arc. This marks a significant moment for the beloved series.

headline: Magic: The Gathering - Secrets of Strixhaven Codex Bundle - Where to Find In Stock
summary: A highly sought-after Magic: The Gathering product is back in stock. The Secrets of Strixhaven Codex Bundle is now available. Best Buy is currently stocking this popular item for collectors.

headline: How to Play the God of War Games in Order
summary: A guide details the correct chronological order for playing the God of War games. Fans can now experience the epic saga in its intended sequence. Understand the complete narrative flow of Kratos's journey.

headline: Control Resonant Preorders Are Live – Here’s What Comes in Each Edition
summary: Preorders for Remedy's new game, Control Resonant, are now live. Information on what is included in each edition has been released. Secure your copy of the anticipated title today.

headline: PM accuses Farage of exploiting Nowak case and denies 'two-tier policing' claim
summary: The Prime Minister accused Farage of exploiting the Nowak case. He denied claims of 'two-tier policing' within the UK. Farage had urged the public to respond with 'pure, cold rage'.

headline: Three die in Royal Navy helicopter crash during training exercise
summary: Three individuals died in a Royal Navy helicopter crash in Devon. The incident occurred during a routine training exercise. The Royal Family, PM, and Navy head offered condolences.

headline: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg as Putin's flagship economic forum opens
summary: Ukrainian drones struck oil storage facilities near St Petersburg. The attack coincided with the opening of Putin's flagship economic forum. Multiple long-range drones were reportedly involved in the strikes.

headline: One killed and dozens injured in Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport
summary: Iranian drone strikes on Kuwait airport resulted in one fatality and dozens of injuries. Iran stated the attack was retaliation for earlier US strikes. The US had targeted an Iranian oil tanker and island.
